title: execute_sql
description: Run exactly one read-only SQL statement as agent_readonly; rows capped at 500. Design: docs/agent-tools-spec.md §2; version enforced by tests/test_tool_schemas.py.

sql.description: Exactly one SQL SELECT (or WITH ... SELECT) statement. No semicolon-separated statement lists. Results are capped at 500 rows; use LIMIT and aggregates rather than pulling raw rows.

examples.sql: SELECT corridor, count(*) FROM graph_node GROUP BY corridor

sql.description: The statement exactly as executed; surface it alongside any answer derived from these rows.

items.description: JSON-safe scalar; numeric(10,2) money and timestamps arrive as strings (exact decimal / ISO-8601).

truncated.description: True when the query produced more than 500 rows and the rest were dropped.

error.description: Postgres or validation error message (truncated to ~500 chars). Read it, fix the statement, try again.

examples.sql: SELECT corridor, count(*) FROM graph_node GROUP BY corridor
